response.justification: Exceptional technical depth and open-source expertise make this candidate a strong individual contributor, but the role requires a team leader and architect. The resume shows a primarily IC-focused trajectory with unclear people management experience. More critically, German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' while the role explicitly requires C1 minimum—a non-negotiable requirement for a senior leadership position at a German company. The candidate lacks demonstrated expertise in UML, formal architecture design, and compliance/security frameworks.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems) demonstrating technical versatility
Open-source project creation and maintenance (GISCollective) shows autonomous architectural thinking and long-term ownership
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, public talks, and community contribution
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' but role requires C1 minimum—critical for a leadership position at a Berlin-based German company
Career trajectory shows primarily senior individual-contributor roles; team leadership and people management experience unclear or absent
No demonstrated expertise in UML, formal IT architecture methodologies, compliance, or requirements management—all required for this role

key_factors.factor: Language barrier (German C1 requirement vs. Basic proficiency)
Leadership/management experience gap (role requires team leadership, resume shows IC focus)
Technical depth and open-source architecture thinking
